content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Lucky Queries". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/145/problem/E
constraints: 1 <= query range start <= query range end <= n
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of elements in the array. The second line contains n space-separated integers. The third line contains an integer q, the number of queries. The following q lines contain two space-separated integers, the start and end indices of the query range.
content.outputFormat: For each query, output the count of lucky numbers in the specified range.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Count the lucky numbers in the given range by checking each number if it's lucky (i.e., it contains only 4's and 7's).
